title: Blend early 2000s athletic aesthetic into the retro magazine design

requirements.text: Introduce early 2000s athletic/sports visual accents into the existing 1970s retro theme across the entire app. Add bold condensed sans-serif sport fonts (e.g., Impact-style or a condensed athletic face) for select headings, callouts, and nav hover states. Incorporate jersey-style large numerals for issue numbers and page indicators. Add dynamic diagonal stripe or swoosh motifs as decorative dividers and section borders — rendered in CSS — using the existing retro color palette (rust, mustard, avocado) augmented with crisp white and a deep navy or black for sporty contrast. Keep the 1970s newsprint base intact; the athletic elements should feel like a retro sports magazine crossover, not a full rebrand.

quotes: give a little early 200s athletic in it

acceptanceCriteria: At least one bold condensed sans-serif athletic font is applied to issue numbers, page indicators, or section headers throughout the app
Issue number on the Home page and page indicator in the Reader use a large jersey-style numeral treatment
At least two decorative CSS diagonal stripe or swoosh dividers appear in the layout (e.g., between masthead and nav, or between content sections)
Sporty color accents (crisp white, deep navy or black) are introduced as highlights without overriding the core 1970s earth-tone palette
Navigation hover effects incorporate at least one athletic-style treatment (underline swoosh, bold transform, or stripe flash)
The overall look reads as a 1970s retro magazine with sports-mag energy — not a modern sports site

constraints: Do not remove or override the core 1970s retro theme — earth tones, newsprint texture, retro serif masthead, and monospace body text must remain dominant
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
All styling changes must use Tailwind CSS classes or the existing CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js
nonGoals: Full rebrand to a modern sports aesthetic
Adding actual sports content or sports-related pages
Replacing the existing retro serif masthead font
